title: Migrating from wrangler dev
excerpt: description: Migrating from wrangler dev to the Vite plugin image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. In most cases, migrating from [wrangler dev](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/wrangler/commands/general/#dev) is straightforward and you can follow the instructions in [Get started](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/vite-plugin/get-started/).…
